name: Forest Guardian: The Stag
description: The Verdant is home to many types of wildlife, however it's the magic in this wildlife that makes them so...unique. These animals were hunted frequently, and killed for sport, causing the alleged creation of the Forest Guardians. The Wolf guides the faithful hunters, the Lamb nurses and cares for the wildlife. But what of the magic? That, would in the care of the Stag...
creator: kcp33
